_comment: Universal skills the blueprint does NOT vendor. SETUP fetches each from its canonical public repo at install (always latest). Single source of truth — the blueprint never holds a copy that can silently drift. Refresh/export MUST NOT re-vendor these; it only maintains this list. The blueprint no longer bundles any skill under templates/skills/ — what used to ship as standalone skills (rnd, wave:refine, wave:review, quality:prompt, quality:doc, audit:code-hygiene, audit:security, and 360) are now nested COMMANDS under templates/commands/ (p/rnd.md, wave/{refine,review}.md, quality/{prompt,doc}.md, audit/{code-hygiene,security}.md, p/360.md), each registering via its frontmatter name. 360 ships as the portable command templates/commands/p/360.md — it is NOT source-fetched.
